ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "gbd_region" TEXT /* Geographical region associated with the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the geographical region */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high-income, low-income) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "neoMR" REAL /* Neonatal mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "postneoMR" REAL /* Post-neonatal mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "age1_5MR" REAL /* Mortality rate for ages 1-5 per 1,000 live births */,
  "under5MR" REAL /* Under-5 mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "neoDeaths" INTEGER /* Number of neonatal deaths */,
  "postneoDeaths" INTEGER /* Number of post-neonatal deaths */,
  "age1_5Deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths for ages 1-5 */,
  "under5Deaths" INTEGER /* Total under-5 deaths */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_data_quality FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the health region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's health characteristics */,
  "gbd_region" TEXT /* GBD region associated with the health region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value (e.g., 2010, 2011) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_types" (
  "mortality_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of mortality */,
  "mortality_type" TEXT /* Name of the mortality type (e.g., Neonatal, Under-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mortality type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the summary */,
  "total_neonatal_deaths" INTEGER /* Total neonatal deaths */,
  "total_postneo_deaths" INTEGER /* Total post-neonatal deaths */,
  "total_under5_deaths" INTEGER /* Total under-5 deaths */,
  "summary_year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_summary_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality level */,
  "quality_level" TEXT /* Level of data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)
